title: "Tomorrow" Group for My Work
excerpt: I use My Work as my primary starting point to manage my day outside of my calendar.  It would be helpful for me to be able to prioritize my day tomorrow without having all of tomorrow’s tasks wrapped up with all of the d…

posts.author: bpoole (Bill Poole)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use My Work as my primary starting point to manage my day outside of my calendar. It would be helpful for me to be able to prioritize my day tomorrow without having all of tomorrow’s tasks wrapped up with all of the different tasks for the rest of the week.
So, I would like to have a “Tomorrow” Group for My Work

posts.author: h.wolman (Helmut Wolman)
posts.cookedHtml: Here ist the same request already: Include a ‘tomorrow’ section within My Work - Feature requests - monday Community Forum
